title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Sanji, Unknown person #14 as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hihih! So here you are. Don't waste my time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Damn you! What took you so long?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you doing, sangoro?! Don't fight him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once Drake and Hawkins get here, it's curtains!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank- Fully this guy doesn't know who I am.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I won't let him find out! Or let myself get hurt!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can deal with an idiot like this before you know it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Increasing our strength is a good idea,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But reducing theirs ain't bad either!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's fine as long as they don't find out, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The power of the science he once hated so much!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 23 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
